FirstStepAI Onboarding System
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: AI-driven onboarding platform that converts policy PDFs into 30-second intro videos and 10-question quizzes, eliminating the need for in-person trainers.

nodes.label: 30-Second Intro Video + 10-Question Quiz
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: Designed to keep each policy chunk bite-sized (30s) so it is digestible, and quiz length (10 Q) balances assessment coverage against employee time.

nodes.label: LLM-Driven Quiz Generation
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: Uses a large language model to author quiz items from the ingested policy text, avoiding hand-authored question banks.

nodes.label: ChromaDB Vector Store + RAG Pipeline
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: Policies are chunked and embedded into ChromaDB so the LLM only reasons over retrieved policy text, grounding generation in the source PDF.

nodes.label: Web Search Tools (DuckDuckGo, Arxiv, Wikipedia)
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: Optional tools the agent can invoke when the local policy corpus lacks an answer; allow expansion beyond the static document.

nodes.label: 80% Quiz Pass Threshold
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: A passing bar of 80% balances rigor with achievable mastery for new hires on dense compliance material.

nodes.label: 7-Day Cooldown Retake Policy
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: Enforces a deliberate re-study window so retakes measure learning rather than short-term recall.

nodes.label: Manager Approval Escalation
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: A human-in-the-loop fallback for employees who fail repeatedly, so accountability stays with a manager instead of the AI.

nodes.label: Hallucination Control via System-Prompt Guardrails
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: System prompt instructs the LLM to answer 'I don't know' when the policy text is silent, trading completeness for factual safety on compliance topics.

nodes.label: Mandatory Source Citation
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: Every answer must cite its policy section so employees and auditors can verify the source, making the system auditable.

nodes.label: Scope Confinement to Policy Corpus
nodes.author: Umbrella Corporation Human Resources Department
nodes.rationale: Jailbreak-resistant system prompt confines the agent to Umbrella Corp policy content, preventing off-topic or unsafe responses in an HR context.
